# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Production Continuous Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write
  deployments: write

concurrency:
  group: production-deploy
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    outputs:
      build-artifact-hash: ${{ steps.hash.outputs.sha256 }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Run post-install scripts explicitly
        run: npm rebuild

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Generate build artifact hash
        id: hash
        run: |
          find dist/ -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort | sha256sum | awk '{print "sha256="$1}' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run post-install scripts explicitly
        run: npm rebuild

      - name: Run linter
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --coverage
        env:
          CI: true

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npm run test:integration
        env:
          CI: true

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scanning
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run npm audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev

      - name: Run security linter
        run: npx --yes semgrep --config auto --error src/

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    needs:
      - build
      - test
      - security-scan
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deployment-url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Verify build artifact integrity
        run: |
          EXPECTED_HASH="${{ needs.build.outputs.build-artifact-hash }}"
          ACTUAL_HASH=$(find dist/ -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}')
          if [ "$EXPECTED_HASH" != "$ACTUAL_HASH" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build artifact integrity check failed!"
            echo "Expected: $EXPECTED_HASH"
            echo "Actual:   $ACTUAL_HASH"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build artifact integrity verified."

      - name: Authenticate to cloud provider
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_DEPLOY_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION }}
          role-session-name: github-actions-deploy-${{ github.run_id }}
          role-duration-seconds: 900

      - name: Deploy to production
        id: deploy
        run: |
          DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ")
          SHORT_SHA=$(echo "${{ github.sha }}" | head -c 7)

          aws s3 sync dist/ "s3://${DEPLOY_BUCKET}/releases/${SHORT_SHA}/" \
            --no-progress \
            --sse AES256 \
            --cache-control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable" \
            --exclude "index.html" \
            --exclude "*.json"

          aws s3 cp dist/index.html "s3://${DEPLOY_BUCKET}/releases/${SHORT_SHA}/index.html" \
            --sse AES256 \
            --cache-control "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"

          aws cloudfront create-invalidation \
            --distribution-id "${CF_DISTRIBUTION_ID}" \
            --paths "/*" \
            --no-cli-pager

          echo "deployment-url=https://${PRODUCTION_DOMAIN}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Deployed commit ${SHORT_SHA} at ${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}"
        env:
          DEPLOY_BUCKET: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_S3_BUCKET }}
          CF_DISTRIBUTION_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID }}
          PRODUCTION_DOMAIN: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_DOMAIN }}

      - name: Verify deployment health
        run: |
          PRODUCTION_URL="https://${PRODUCTION_DOMAIN}"
          MAX_RETRIES=5
          RETRY_DELAY=10

          for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 30 "${PRODUCTION_URL}/health" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              echo "Health check passed (attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES})"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "Health check returned ${HTTP_STATUS} (attempt ${i}/${MAX_RETRIES})"
            if [ "$i" -lt "$MAX_RETRIES" ]; then
              sleep $RETRY_DELAY
            fi
          done

          echo "::error::Production health check failed after ${MAX_RETRIES} attempts"
          exit 1
        env:
          PRODUCTION_DOMAIN: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_DOMAIN }}

  post-deploy-smoke-test:
    name: Post-Deploy Smoke Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    needs: deploy
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run smoke tests against production
        run: npm run test:smoke
        env:
          TEST_BASE_URL: "https://${{ vars.PRODUCTION_DOMAIN }}"
          CI: true

      - name: Notify on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          curl -X POST "${{ secrets.ALERT_WEBHOOK_URL }}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            --max-time 30 \
            -d "{
              \"text\": \"🚨 Production smoke tests failed for commit ${{ github.sha }}\",
              \"commit\": \"$(echo '${{ github.sha }}' | head -c 7)\",
              \"run_url\": \"${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}\"
            }"
